label: agent loop • create a new file from scratch
query: Create a file named TODO.md in this folder containing a markdown checklist with exactly these three unchecked items: 'write tests', 'update docs', 'tag release'.
notes: Bare file-creation case in an empty workspace. Pins that the model can produce a file at a specific path with specified content without an existing file to anchor on. The clean path: no tool call may return an error envelope.
